name: TG
cooked: just ordered one, so count me in for the hacking crew! always fun to open a TE device! writing a custom firmware from scratch would def be possible, but the challenge would be how to load it onto other devices without requiring hardware mods… we’ll see!
raw: just ordered one, so count me in for the hacking crew! always fun to open a TE device! writing a custom firmware from scratch would def be possible, but the challenge would be how to *load* it onto other devices without requiring hardware mods... we'll see!
